_meta.keyKnowledge: We rehearse and perform music we have learnt or composed for an audience.

_source.w: We rehearse and perform music we have learnt or composed for an audience.
y: Performing for others is how we share our musical work and hard effort.
Rehearsing teaches us discipline, teamwork and attention to detail.
Live performance creates a special connection between musicians and their audience.
eg: We perform unison songs, rounds and instrumental music with melody and accompaniment parts.
We introduce our performances by sharing information about the music.
We rehearse to improve accuracy, expression and timing before performing.
We perform at a school assembly, concert or classroom event.
We follow cues from a conductor or group leader during our performance.
We reflect on our performance afterwards — what worked well and what to improve next time.
